AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class InputHelper

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Provides helpers for resolving user/project trade context from the active Revit document.

public static class InputHelper
Inheritance
object
InputHelper
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Uses the configured ITradeService to derive TradeInfo from the active document title. Intended for commands that need to filter or behave differently by trade (e.g., MP/PL/PP).

Methods

GetTradeInfo(List<Trade>)

Gets trade information derived from the active document's title.

public static TradeInfo GetTradeInfo(List<Trade> validAbbreviations = null)

Parameters

validAbbreviations List<Trade>

Optional whitelist of trades to accept (e.g. MP/PL/PP). If provided, the service may reject/return null for others.

Returns

TradeInfo

A TradeInfo instance when a trade can be determined; otherwise null (for example when no active document exists or no trade can be inferred).

Remarks

This method depends on RevitContext.ActiveDocument (pre-2027 build symbol) and will return null when there is no active document.
